text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There's still the 2,400-meter race left. But I'm
ready to Bakushin right through the summer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do my best on the track and at the
summer camp. I'll be a perfect role model from
start to finish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the summer camp where the
Umamusume train to improve their skills begins!
